creator: amontalban@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

I have tested pkg.freebsd.org mirrors today and they are failing with the following message:

Fastly error: unknown domain: pkg.freebsd.org. Please check that this domain has been added to a service.

I'm using Google DNS and you can find my DNS query at https://pastebin.com/raw/XH9Np5Lb

As a workaround I used OpenDNS (208.67.220.220 / 208.67.222.222) and it resolves to 96.47.72.71 which works.

I have tested this from Uruguay and Argentina where it gives the above error.
